findings: Fall protection compliant on all floors above Level 5. Level 11 steel erection perimeter cables properly installed. Two workers missing eye protection in masonry area. Housekeeping acceptable. Fire extinguishers all current. OSHA 300 log posted and current. Davis-Bacon posters and EEO notices posted at job trailer.
corrective_actions: Issued replacement eye protection from safety trailer. Reminded masonry foreman of PPE requirements at tailgate. Documented in safety log.
project_name: Federal District Courthouse & Public Safety Complex

findings: Tower crane certification current - annual load test passed. All man lift operator certifications verified. CAT 336 daily logs complete. Concrete pump boom and outriggers inspected and compliant. Generator grounding bonded and verified. Welding equipment fire watch procedures in place.
corrective_actions: All certifications filed in safety binder. No corrective actions required.
project_name: Federal District Courthouse & Public Safety Complex

findings: GSA COR accompanied inspection. Davis-Bacon certified payrolls current through last pay period. Section 3 worker tracking log reviewed - 14 Section 3 new hires on project. Section 3 at 8.2% of labor hours - below 25% goal. LEED documentation binders reviewed - up to date. Safety Data Sheets complete in trailer. EM-385 compliance verified for federal site.
corrective_actions: Created Section 3 outreach plan to increase hiring from 8.2% to target. Contacted 3 local workforce development organizations for candidate pipeline. Will report progress at next monthly compliance meeting.
project_name: Federal District Courthouse & Public Safety Complex

findings: OSHA compliance officer conducted unannounced inspection. Cited potential for inadequate fall protection at leading edge Level 8 during concrete deck pour. Temporary cables were removed to allow concrete truck access and not reinstalled promptly. Two housekeeping findings at Level B1 storage area.
corrective_actions: Immediately reinstalled fall protection at Level 8 perimeter. Issued formal procedure for fall protection removal and reinstallation protocol. Cleared Level B1 storage. Responded to OSHA within 15-day requirement. No citations issued.
